global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to sign up for a card with confidence.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large circular shape and a rectangular shape are centered, both in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Overlapping shapes
elements.description: Another circular shape overlaps with the previous shapes, adding depth and interest.

elements.label: Smaller geometric shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape is positioned slightly above the center, contributing to the geometric theme.

elements.label: Additional circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape is placed in the center, creating a focal point for the ad.

elements.label: Unidentified element

elements.label: Unidentified element

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: A bold text message at the bottom, stating 'Save with confidence Fast signup instant card' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' is displayed at the top left corner in a prominent font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A call-to-action button at the bottom, labeled 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color for visibility.
